items.title: Login: User can sign up to their account with new credentials using email and password option
Login: User can sign up to their account with new credentials using "continue with google button".
Login: User can sign up to their account with new credentials using "continue with apple". button.
Login: User cannot sign up to a new account with existing credentials
Login: User cannot sign up to a new account with invalid email
Login: User cannot sign up to an account with Password under 8 characters
Login: User cannot sign up to an account with Password too simple (no upercase letter)
Login: User cannot sign up to an account with Password too simple (no number)
Login: Verification code resend button
Login: Verification code resend button - try and use old code
Login: Log in with Existing credentials
Login: Log out
Login: Password reset
Login: Password reset - old password attempt
Login: Login with wrong password for an existing account
Login: Login with empty fields
Invite Your Partner button + Send invite by email
Invite Your Partner button + Send invite with link
Invite Your Partner button + Scan code
Invite Your Partner button + Scan code
Intite: Enter an invalid login code
Delete: Delete Account
Delete: Deleted Account, new account with same credentials

f.expected: User creates Account by entering their email and password, user get's verification message in email, uses it to finish log in set up
f.actual: User creates Account by entering their email and password, user get's verification message in email, uses it to finish log in set up

f.expected: User creates an account by clicking "get started on the home screen and then clicking the "continue with google" button,
f.actual:
User creates an account by clicking "get started on the home screen and then clicking the "continue with google" button, 
User is taken to Question screen

f.expected:
User creates an account by clicking "get started on the home screen and then clicking the "continue with applee" button, 
User is taken to Question screen
f.actual: User successfully creates an account but is taken directly to Home screen rather than filling Sparx questions

f.steps:
1. Create a new account with email and password
2. Exit out of App
f.expected: User trying to create new account with existing credentials see's message that an account already exists and they should  log in rather than create a new account.
f.actual: User flows to verification stage and does not receive any verification messages

f.steps: 1. User tries to sign up with an invalid email but with a valid password.
f.expected: User receives a message saying "Enter a valid email." and the box which contains that information turns red.
f.actual: User receives a message saying "Enter a valid email." and the box which contains that information turns red.

f.steps: 1. User tries to sign up with an invalid email but with a valid password - under 8 characters
f.expected: User receives message saying "include at least 8 characters"
f.actual: User receives message saying "At least 8 characters"

f.steps: 1. User tries to sign up with an invalid email but with a valid password - no upercase characters
f.expected: User receives message saying "include at least 1 uppercase letter"
f.actual: User receives message saying "Include at least 1 uppercase letter"

f.steps: 1. User tries to sign up with an invalid email but with a valid password - no numbers
f.expected: User receives message saying "include at least 1 number"
f.actual: User receives message saying "Include at least 1 uppercase letter"

f.steps:
1. User waits 30 seconds until a resend is available.
2. User clicks on "Didn't reveice a code? Resend"
3. User enters new code into account verification slot
f.expected: User receives a new verification code to their email. This code can be entered into the app resulting in log in
f.actual: User receives a new verification code to their email. This code can be entered into the app resulting in log in

f.steps:
1. User waits 30 seconds until a resend is available.
2. User clicks on "Didn't reveice a code? Resend"
3. User enters old code into account verification slot
f.expected: User receives a new verification code to their email. The user entering the old code into verification received a notification "invalid code"

f.steps: Log in to app with existing credentials
f.expected: User is logged into app and taken to home screen / dashboard
f.actual: User is logged into app and taken to home screen / dashboard

f.steps:
1. User navigates to settings
2. User clicks logout
3. User is notified of logging out and asked to confirm
4. User logs out
f.expected: User is logged out of app
f.actual: User is logged out of app

f.steps:
1. User navigates to log in screen
2. User clicks "forgot password"
3. User enters their email 
4. User enters validation code from email into app
5. User enters new password into App to log in
f.expected: User should have an updated password and able to log in only using the new password
f.actual: User should have an updated password and able to log in only using the new password

f.steps:
1. User navigates to log in screen
2. User clicks "forgot password"
3. User enters their email 
4. User enters validation code from email into app
5. User enters old password into App to log in
f.expected: User should have an updated password and not able to log in using the old password

f.steps:
1. Click Invite your partner link
2. Select "Send Invite"
3. Select Share link"
f.expected: User Receives link to sign up to Box and Ring App

f.steps:
1. User clicks on Settings
2. User selects "delete accout" 
3. User gets warning that their account and data will be deleted perminantly
4. User Selects "delete account"
5. User is transferred to Sign up screen
f.expected: User's account is deleted from system

f.steps:
1. User deletes their account
2. User creates a new account with same user details
f.expected: User has a new account in system with same credentials
